AccoRevit.Addin
Table of Contents

Class BaseModelHelper

Namespace
AccoRevit.Addin.Utils
Assembly
AccoRevit.Addin.dll

Base helper for locating and opening version-specific "container" Revit models from a configured folder.

public abstract class BaseModelHelper
Inheritance
object
BaseModelHelper
Derived
ContainerModelHelper
SpoolingContainerModelHelper
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()
Extension Methods
UnitExtensions.ToUnitLabel(object)
ReflectionUtils.GetHighlightProperty(object)
ReflectionUtils.SetPropertyValue(object, PropertyInfo, object)
SystemExtensions.Cast<T>(object)

Remarks

Derived types provide the root folder (BasePath) and the version-derived file naming logic (FileName). This helper can return the resolved file path, reuse an already-open document if present, or open the model detached from central.

Errors are surfaced via CustomMessageBox and methods return null on failure.

Constructors

BaseModelHelper() 

protected BaseModelHelper()

Properties

BasePath

Gets the root folder that contains the container model files.

protected abstract string BasePath { get; }

Property Value

string

ContainerModelFilePath

Gets the resolved full file path to the container model if it exists on disk.

public string ContainerModelFilePath { get; }

Property Value

string

The full file path to the container model, or null if the file does not exist or an error occurs.

Remarks

The path is constructed as Path.Combine(BasePath, FileName) and verified using Exists(string). Exceptions are caught and shown to the user.

FileName

Gets the container model file name for the current Revit version.

public abstract string FileName { get; }

Property Value

string

Methods

GetElementsByNames<T>(Document, IEnumerable<string>)

Collects instance elements of type T whose Autodesk.Revit.DB.Element.Name matches any of the provided names (case-insensitive).

public static List<T> GetElementsByNames<T>(Document doc, IEnumerable<string> names) where T : Element

Parameters

doc Document

The Revit document to search.

names IEnumerable<string>

Names to match against Autodesk.Revit.DB.Element.Name.

Returns

List<T>

A list of matching instance elements; returns an empty list when inputs are null.

Type Parameters

T

The Revit element class to collect.

Remarks

Uses Autodesk.Revit.DB.FilteredElementCollector.WhereElementIsNotElementType to exclude element types.

GetRevitYear()

Parses the current Revit application version number and returns the Revit year (e.g., 2024).

protected int GetRevitYear()

Returns

int

The Revit year derived from the application version number.

Exceptions

InvalidOperationException

Thrown when the application version cannot be parsed to a year, or the value is below 2020.

TryGetContainerModelDocument(UIApplication)

Attempts to obtain the container model Autodesk.Revit.DB.Document for the current Revit version.

public Document TryGetContainerModelDocument(UIApplication app)

Parameters

app UIApplication

The Revit UI application used to query open documents and open the model if needed.

Returns

Document

An already-open container model document if present; otherwise a newly opened document; or null on failure.

Remarks

If the model is not open, the method opens it using Autodesk.Revit.DB.OpenOptions with Autodesk.Revit.DB.DetachFromCentralOption.DetachAndPreserveWorksets to avoid modifying central/workshared state.

If the file does not exist on disk, a warning is shown and null is returned.
